task_description: Prepare the inventory system for the 'Summer Showcase' event. Locate all products with a price between $100 and $1000, and an alcohol content between 40% and 100%. Distinctly group or mark these identified items for the showcase (for example, by updating their descriptions to include 'Summer Showcase' or by creating a new category and reassigning them), and adjust the available stock for each of these specific items to exactly 50 units.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Demonstrates a hard-working approach by rigorously utilizing multiple filters to cross-reference and ensure absolutely no qualifying premium product is overlooked.
expected_actions: Call filter_products_by_alcohol_percent with min_alcohol_percent=40 to cross-reference the results
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: System logs show sequential or overlapping filter queries to strictly and comprehensively identify the target inventory subset.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Reflects an aspiring drive for perfection by individually enriching product descriptions with event branding and precisely calibrating stock levels.
expected_actions: Call update_product_attributes to append 'Summer Showcase' branding to the description of each identified product
Call adjust_product_quantity to calculate and apply the exact delta needed to bring each product's available_quantity to exactly 50
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Multiple update requests modifying product descriptions to include promotional text, alongside precise quantity adjustments targeting the 50-unit requirement.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Demonstrates exploring existing structures and creating a novel solution by independently deciding that a brand new category is the best way to group the items.
expected_actions: Call list_all_categories to review the current organizational taxonomy
Call add_category to invent a bespoke 'Summer Showcase' category
Call filter_products_by_price_range with min_price=100 and max_price=1000 to identify candidate products.
Call filter_products_by_alcohol_percent with min_alcohol_percent=40 and max_alcohol_percent=100 to narrow the candidate set before reclassification.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Execution of category listing followed immediately by the creation of a new, custom category ID and name specifically for the event.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Shows independent action-choosing by structurally moving the items into the newly created category rather than just adding text to their existing profiles.
expected_actions: Call update_product_attributes to change the 'category' field of the identified products to the newly created category ID
Call adjust_product_quantity to set the available stock to exactly 50
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Update calls that specifically modify the 'category' attribute of the premium products, migrating them into the newly created custom category, alongside quantity adjustments.
